arts.ttl: Will PSG tie provide Champions League redemption for Emery?
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery will get a shot at redemption for the lowest point of his stellar European career when he faces former club Paris St-Germain in the Champions League quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique sends plea to PSG fans over homophobic chant fears
arts.sum: PSG and Marseille's games are often fiercely contested and there are fears the top-of-the-table clash will be marred by homophobic abuse after vile chants were heard in the reverse fixture in October
